name: fe-automation
description: Frontend automation base using Playwright and Cucumber Gherkin.

scripts.test: npm run clean:results && cucumber-js && npm run report:html
scripts.test:ui: npm run clean:results && cucumber-js --profile ui && npm run report:html
scripts.test:smoke: npm run clean:results && cucumber-js --profile smoke && npm run report:html
scripts.test:headed: npm run clean:results && cross-env HEADLESS=false cucumber-js --profile ui && npm run report:html
scripts.test:debug: npm run clean:results && cross-env HEADLESS=false PWDEBUG=1 cucumber-js --profile ui
